PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHAN, NGA PHAN, DIEM NGUYEN, THAO NGUYEN, VIET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YIP, KAN FAI $900.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $900.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR DEFT TO PAY EACH PLAINTIFF $300. PLUS STATUTORY COSTS, WITH THE EXCEPTION OF PLTF VIET NGUYEN, WHOSE CLAIM IS DENIED.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHAN, NGA PHAN, DIEM NGUYEN, THAO NGUYEN, VIET
